description: Golden set for the Veridoc cited copilot. Each case seeds a document, asks a question, and asserts the answer contains expected substrings and at least one citation.

doc.title: Data Processing Agreement
doc.text: The processor shall retain personal data for no longer than 90 days after contract termination, after which all copies are securely deleted. Sub-processors must be approved in writing.

cases.question: How long can personal data be retained after termination?

doc.title: Incident Response Policy
doc.text: Data breaches must be reported to the controller within 24 hours of detection. The security team owns triage and notification.

cases.question: What is the breach notification deadline?

doc.title: Patient Record
doc.text: Patient Jordan Rivera. Primary diagnosis: hypertension. Prescribed lisinopril 10mg daily. Allergies: penicillin.

cases.question: What is the patient's primary diagnosis and prescription?

doc.title: Office Policy
doc.text: The office is open Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm. Visitors must sign in at the front desk.

cases.question: What is the company's revenue last quarter?
